context: Tests whether the agent correctly extends the product schema with the right column types and creates the HS code reference table, implements a two-layer restriction screening function, seeds known restrictions, and positions screening at checkout rather than post-label.

checklist.name: hs_code column type
checklist.description: hs_code column is defined as VARCHAR(10) (not VARCHAR(6), VARCHAR(20), TEXT, or other type)

checklist.name: country_of_origin column type
checklist.description: country_of_origin column is defined as VARCHAR(2) (exactly 2-char code, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)

checklist.name: restricted_countries array type
checklist.description: restricted_countries column is defined as an array of 2-char codes (e.g. VARCHAR(2)[] or TEXT[] with a note about 2-char codes)

checklist.name: declared_value_override in cents
checklist.description: declared_value_override column is INTEGER (not DECIMAL/FLOAT) with a comment or note indicating it stores cents

checklist.name: hs_codes reference table
checklist.description: A separate hs_codes reference table is created with at least a primary key code column and a description column

checklist.name: Product-level restriction check
checklist.description: screenForRestrictions checks each product's own restricted_countries field against the destination country

checklist.name: Global restriction DB check
checklist.description: screenForRestrictions also queries a global/shared restrictions table by (country_code, hs_code) — two-layer check, not just product-level

checklist.name: Return type shape
checklist.description: screenForRestrictions returns an object with both an 'allowed' boolean AND a 'blockedProducts' array (not just one or the other)

checklist.name: Known restrictions seeded
checklist.description: Seed data includes entries for at least 2 of: Australia firearm parts (hs prefix 9305), India alcohol (hs prefix 2207), China consumer electronics (hs prefix 8517)

checklist.name: Screening at checkout
checklist.description: notes.md or code comments explicitly state that screening should occur before fulfillment/at checkout, not after label creation

checklist.name: Blocked product details
checklist.description: Each entry in blockedProducts includes at least productId (or id), name, and a reason string
